title: crotalaria ledermannii
intro: Crotalaria ledermannii is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as a type of legume or pea plant. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve skin health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria ledermannii is often made into a tea or infusion, and its leaves and stems are also used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and ointments.
